_comment: A structured screen-walk snapshot for a BUILT task_tracker app — the shape a read-only applyModelApiCode walk emits (per the contract in harness/verify.py: {id, components:[{id,type,boundTo}], navigation:[{fromComponent,event,toScreen}]}). The orchestrator fetches this via the MCP and feeds it to `harness-verify --phase live --screens`. Matches examples/task_tracker/app_spec.json, so live verify PASSES.
